details.place_name: White Veil Coffee @ Pure on The Plaza

raw_data.name: White Veil Coffee @ Pure on The Plaza
raw_data.name_for_emails: White Veil Coffee @ Pure On The Plaza
raw_data.owner_title: White Veil Coffee @ Pure on The Plaza

reviews_data.review_text: One of the best local coffee spots in Charlotte, with an amazing selection of drinks.
Absolutely amazing coffee, service and atmosphere!  Cannot wait to return and try more menu items!
This is hands down the best coffee and matcha. After trying White Veil Coffee, I will only get coffee from here.
Amazing coffee, wonderful service, inviting atmosphere!

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace

reviews_data.review_text: Great coffee, amazing service, and good vibes. 10/10 recommend.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Savannah! It was great meeting you- thank you so much for the kind words! We’re so happy you loved the coffee- we strive for only the highest quality of coffee and service! We hope to see you again soon- will keep you updated on the leftover pizza :)
reviews_data.review_text:
Simple, warm, and delicious coffee. Can't go wrong with a vanilla latte; it was slightly lighter than typical coffees around here which was perfect for the spring/summer weather.

One of the few coffee shops that charges under $13 for two coffees and has punch cards?! Amazing !!

Only request, wish they sold leftover/cold Pure pizza by the slice for a quick morning pick me up!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Marta! Thank you so much for your kind words! We’re happy you loved our spot, and hope you’ll be back to visit again!
reviews_data.review_text:
Loved this spot! We stopped in for a quick morning coffee on a workday while visiting the city and it ended up being the perfect find.

Tim was amazing! Super friendly, easy to talk to, and went above and beyond helping us decide what to order. He also gave us great recommendations for other places to check out while we were in town. We had our dog with us, and he kindly let her come in while we ordered.

We got the lavender honey latte and it was so good. Flavorful, smooth, and not overly sweet. I got a croissant and Tim warmed it up for me, it was delicious!!

The only small thing to note is that the location was a little tricky to find at first because it shares a space with a pizza place. Since we’re not from the city, we had to do a quick double take. We went before the pizza spot opened, so it was quiet, relaxed, and not too busy.

Overall, such a cute spot with great coffee and even better service!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Erik! Thank you so much for your kind words and recommendations! We hope to see you again soon!
Hi Mark! Thank you so much for your kind words and review! We hope to see you inside our shop again soon
